data.title: Rexford Industrial Announces First Quarter 2026 Financial Results
data.description: On April 23, 2026, in Los Angeles, Rexford Industrial Realty, Inc. (NYSE: REXR), a real estate investment trust specializing in industrial properties in Southern California, announced their latest venture. The company aims to grow value through investment and operation of industrial properties in the region.

data.title: PMI Foods Celebrates Earth Day By Planting 10,000 Additional Trees With One Tree Planted
data.description: On April 23, 2026, in Salt Lake City, Parker Migliorini International (PMI Foods) made a significant contribution of more than $13,000 to One Tree Planted, a renowned nonprofit dedicated to worldwide reforestation efforts. The donation aims to support the planting of an additional 10,000 trees as part of their partnership. This generous initiative was announced as a part of the Earth Day celebrations.

data.title: Sensient Declares Dividend
data.description: In Milwaukee, the Board of Directors of Sensient Technologies Corporation (NYSE: SXT) announced a regular quarterly cash dividend of $0.41 per share for its common stock. Shareholders of record on May 11, 2026, will receive the cash dividend on June 1, 2026. Sensient Technologies is a prominent worldwide producer and promoter of colors, flavors, and specialized ingredients, utilizing cutting-edge technologies and a strong global supply network.

data.title: Escalade Announces First Quarter 2026 Results Conference Call Date
data.description: Evansville, Indiana – On April 23, 2026, Escalade, Inc. (NASDAQ: ESCA), a prominent provider of sporting goods and recreational equipment, revealed plans to disclose its Q1 2026 financial results before trading commences. Escalade, Inc. is recognized for manufacturing and distributing a wide range of indoor and outdoor recreational products. The company's stock is listed on the NASDAQ exchange under the ticker symbol ESCA.

data.title: Franklin Financial Reports First Quarter 2026 Results; Declares Dividend
data.description: A financial institution based in Chambersburg, Pennsylvania, Franklin Financial Services Corporation recently disclosed their performance for the first quarter of 2026. As the bank holding company for F&M Trust, the Corporation, listed on NASDAQ as FRAF, outlined key operational figures.

data.title: SiriusXM Declares Quarterly Cash Dividend
data.description: Today, SiriusXM declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.27 per share for its common stock (NASDAQ: SIRI). The dividend will be paid on May 27, 2026, to shareholders of record at the close of business.

data.title: Delta Air Lines Declares Quarterly Dividend
data.description: On April 23, 2026, in Atlanta, the Board of Directors of Delta Air Lines (NYSE:DAL) announced a quarterly dividend of $0.1875 per share. Shareholders of record as of May 14, 2026, are eligible for this dividend, which will be distributed on June 4, 2026. Delta Air Lines, a major airline company, regularly provides dividends to its shareholders.

data.title: SUMMIT HOTEL PROPERTIES DECLARES FIRST QUARTER 2026 DIVIDENDS
data.description: In Austin, Texas on April 23, 2026, Summit Hotel Properties, Inc. (NYSE: INN) disclosed that its Board of Directors approved a cash dividend for the first quarter ending on March 31, 2026, amounting to $0.08 per common stock share.

data.title: Encompass Health to participate in BofA Securities 2026 Health Care Conference
data.description: Today, Encompass Health Corp. (NYSE: EHC) revealed its plans to join the BofA Securities 2026 Health Care Conference on May 12-14, 2026. The event, scheduled to take place in Birmingham, Alabama, will see the participation of the company's Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer Doug. This conference is expected to attract significant attention from investors and industry professionals alike.

data.title: Urban One, Inc. First Quarter 2026 Results Conference Call
data.description: A conference call will be held by Urban One, Inc. based in Silver Spring, Md., to discuss the results of the first fiscal quarter of 2026. The company, trading under NASDAQ symbols UONEK and UONE, invites investors, analysts, and other interested parties to join the call. The scheduled date for the conference call is Thursday, May.

data.title: RB Global Announces Early Termination of Hart-Scott-Rodino Waiting Period for BigIron Acquisition
data.description: RB Global, Inc., a leading global marketplace for commercial assets and vehicles, revealed that the U.S. Federal Trade Commission approved the early termination of the waiting period under the HSR Act on April 21, 2026. This decision is in relation to RB Global's acquisition of BigIron Auction Company. The acquisition is a significant move for RB Global, traded on NYSE as RBA and TSX as RBA, as it expands its services and solutions. The early termination is a positive development in the acquisition process, indicating progress towards the completion of the deal.

data.title: QuinStreet Sets Date to Announce Fiscal Third Quarter 2026 Financial Results
data.description: QuinStreet, Inc., a prominent player in performance marketplaces and technologies for financial services and home services sectors, is set to release its financial outcomes for the fiscal third quarter concluding on March 31, 2026, after market closure on Thursday, May 7, 2026. Following this release, a conference call and webcast is scheduled at 2:00 PM PT to delve into and analyze the company's performance. QuinStreet's stock trades on Nasdaq under the symbol QNST.

data.title: Microsoft is offering buyouts to around 7% of its U.S. workforce, aiming at long-serving workers to focus on AI.
data.description: In a strategic move, the technology company is providing early retirement options to its veteran employees as part of its ongoing commitment to substantial investment in artificial intelligence. This initiative aims to optimize operations and align workforce with evolving technology trends. The company's investment in AI is set to reach significant figures, showcasing its dedication to staying at the forefront of technological advancements.

data.title: Intel Stock Soars After Blockbuster Q1 Earnings: Here Are Details
data.description: Intel Corp.'s stock (NASDAQ: INTC) skyrocketed following the release of its first-quarter results, surpassing expectations. After the closing bell on Thursday, the company reported earnings of 29 cents per share, far exceeding the analyst consensus of one cent. Revenue for the quarter totaled $13.58 billion, surpassing the Street estimate by 9.28% and marking an increase from $12.67 billion in the same period last year. The strong performance is attributed to the advancement in AI technology, which is expected to bring intelligence closer to the end user. For further details, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: BRAEMAR HOTELS & RESORTS DECLARES MONTHLY PREFERRED DIVIDENDS FOR APRIL 2026
data.description: Dallas-based Braemar Hotels & Resorts Inc. (NYSE: BHR) revealed today that its Board of Directors has approved a partial cash dividend for the company's 5.5% Series B Cumulative Convertible. This announcement was made on April 23, 2026.

data.title: Franklin Street Properties Corp. Announces Expansion of Strategic Alternatives Process
data.description: In Wakefield, Massachusetts, Franklin Street Properties Corp. (FSP), a real estate investment trust trading on NYSE MKT under FSP, disclosed the expansion of its strategic alternatives review to involve BofA Securities and JLL Securities as co-financial advisors. This move aims to bolster the company's assessment capacity.

data.title: Chimera Investment Corporation Announces First Quarter 2026 Earnings Release and Conference Call Date
data.description: Chimera Investment Corporation has revealed its plans to announce its first quarter earnings for 2026, along with hosting a conference call. The company will share its financial results and insights from the quarter in question during the conference call. Stakeholders and investors are encouraged to participate in the call to gain a better understanding of the company's performance. This event will offer a comprehensive overview of Chimera Investment Corporation's financial standing and is scheduled for a specific date, although exact details were not provided in the rephrased content.

data.title: VICI Properties Inc. Announces Closing Date for Sale-Leaseback Transaction With Golden Entertainment
data.description: In New York, VICI Properties Inc. (NYSE: VICI) has successfully obtained all necessary gaming regulatory and shareholder approvals for its acquisition of the Golden Portfolio from Golden Entertainment, Inc. (NASDAQ: GDEN). The acquisition, valued at $1.16 billion, includes 100% ownership of the land, real property, and improvements of seven casino properties. VICI Properties anticipates closing the transaction by April 30, 2026.
